svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.6 Chrome/144.0.7559.236 Electron/40.8.4 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="r8o5pW_ckPMLLS9esu1i"> <mxGraphModel dx="1424" dy="842" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-1" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;dashed=1;dashPattern=3 3;container=0;" value=": Microservices System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="300" x="30" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-5" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value=": Web Client" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="100" x="130" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-6" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value=": Tracing Server
(Jaeger)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="100" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-7" edge="1" parent="1" source="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-5" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;endFill=1;" target="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-1" value="HTTPS / REST"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-8" edge="1" parent="1" source="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-1" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;endFill=1;" target="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-6" value="gRPC / OTLP"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-2" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value=": Microservices Application" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="60" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-3" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;strokeWidth=2;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value=": Centralized DB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="120" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-4" edge="1" parent="1" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=classic;strokeWidth=1;rounded=0;endFill=1;" target="K-dzwq3itPGrHs0GcO5E-3" value="JDBC "> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> <mxPoint x="180" y="230" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
